channel.title: Soep on Tobias Raabe
channel.description: Recent content in Soep on Tobias Raabe

item.title: Malleability of Locus of Control
item.description: Project type: research Source files: Github This research project investigates whether Locus of Control, a psychological measure for a person’s belief of having control over the outcomes in their own lives, is malleable. We use the GSOEP (German Socio-Economic Panel) from 2005-2015 and estimate in a difference-and-difference design the changes in Locus of Control due to potentially exogenous and negative events like death of a close relative.
